project_reference.core_research_question: Can a self-referential, metacognitive algorithm-discovery system co-evolve solver code and search policy to discover new families of constrained stellarator optimizers that outperform current incumbents?

scope.question: Can a self-referential, metacognitive algorithm-discovery system co-evolve solver code and search policy to discover new families of constrained stellarator optimizers that outperform current incumbents?
in_scope: Locking gold suite and baseline contract
Discovery of new optimizer families via SkyDiscover/HyperAgents substrate
Distillation and simplification of top winners
out_of_scope: Generic hyperparameter tuning of existing ALM
unresolved_questions: Which blind matched-budget benchmark problems will constitute the Gold Suite?
How to faithfully reproduce the 2025 SIMSOPT coil-optimization ALM workflow?

context_gaps: Detailed implementation of SIMSOPT 2025 ALM workflow not verified

formulations: Co-evolution of solver code and search policy
allowed_estimator_families: Semantic code mutation on proxy tasks
forbidden_estimator_families: Direct tuning of existing ALM parameters
stop_and_rethink_conditions: New algorithm disappears under specified ablations

observables.name: Matched-budget convergence
observables.definition: Objective value vs. wall-clock time or JAX-traceable op count

observables.name: Final equilibrium residual
observables.definition: Boozer residual magnitude at converged point

claims.statement: The discovered optimizer family beats DESC lsq-auglag and SIMSOPT ALM on blind matched-budget benchmarks.

deliverables.description: Gold benchmark suite spanning boundary, equilibrium, and coil optimization
Comparison report between discovered optimizer and incumbents

acceptance_tests.subject: claim-superiority
acceptance_tests.procedure: Evaluate discovered optimizer on Gold Suite with sealed oracle assessment
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Statistically significant improvement over incumbents within matched budget

references.why_it_matters: Strongest published ALM workflow in SIMSOPT ecosystem

forbidden_proxies.subject: claim-superiority
forbidden_proxies.reason: Goal is to discover new algorithm families, not tune existing ones

unvalidated_assumptions: Co-evolved search strategy generalizes to unseen problems
competing_explanations: Observed wins are due to better hyperparameter defaults rather than structural discovery

open_questions: Which blind matched-budget benchmark problems will constitute the Gold Suite?
How to faithfully reproduce the 2025 SIMSOPT coil-optimization ALM workflow?

decisions.rationale: scoping contract approved before phase planning

decisions.summary: Research and Plan for Gold Suite and Baseline Contract established
